parameters.name: fields
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ user_id: { stringValue: $json.user_id }, name: { stringValue: $json.name }, email: { stringValue: $json.email }, company: { stringValue: $json.company }, company_size: { stringValue: $json.company_size }, event_type: { stringValue: $json.event_type }, feature: { stringValue: $json.feature }, session_mins: { integerValue: $json.session_mins }, teammates_invited: { integerValue: $json.teammates_invited }, api_calls_today: { integerValue: $json.api_calls_today }, plan: { stringValue: $json.plan }, source: { stringValue: $json.source }, phone: { stringValue: $json.phone }, call_consent: { booleanValue: $json.call_consent }, email_consent: { booleanValue: $json.email_consent }, status: { stringValue: $json.status }, email_status: { stringValue: $json.email_status }, call_status: { stringValue: $json.call_status }, delete_after: { stringValue: $json.delete_after }, processed_at: { stringValue: $json.processed_at } }) }}

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value:
=[{"role":"system","content":"You are a B2B SaaS sales intelligence agent. Return ONLY valid JSON. No markdown."},{"role":"user","content":"Analyze activity for " + $json.name + " at " + $json.company + ".
Event: " + $json.event_type + "
Feature: " + $json.feature + "
Session: " + $json.session_mins + "m
Team: " + $json.teammates_invited + "

Return JSON:
{"tier": "POWER_USER|STUCK_USER|EXPLORER","intent_score": 0-100,"reasoning": "...","recommended_action": "SEND_EMAIL|WATCH","urgency": "HIGH|LOW","primary_pain": "USAGE_LIMIT|NONE"}"}]
